scripts.ota:legacy-apk-notice:preview: node scripts/publish-ota-update.mjs --channel preview --profile preview --runtime-version 1.0.1 --message "提示测试机下载安装新版 APK" --native-installer disabled
scripts.ota:legacy-apk-notice:production: node scripts/publish-ota-update.mjs --channel production --profile production --runtime-version 1.0.1 --message "提示门店下载安装新版 APK" --native-installer disabled
scripts.test:ios-review-mode: npm run test:ios-review-build-config && npx --yes tsx src/modules/ios-review/ios-review.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/ios-review/app-routes.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/ios-review/integration-guards.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/ios-review/side-effects.test.ts
scripts.test:employee-profile: npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/image-processing.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/image-upload.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/cache-keys.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/profile-draft.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/profile-camera-capture.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/identity-photo-expiry.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/employee-profile/cashier-barcode.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/auth/sensitive-query-cache.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/shared/storage/cashier-print-secure-session.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/shared/storage/secure-session-cleanup.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/printer/cpcl-labels.test.ts
scripts.test:reports: npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/revenue-api-normalization.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/growth-rate.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/revenue-format.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/revenue-periods.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/statistics-freshness.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/report-refresh.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/modules/reports/report-timeout.test.ts && npx --yes tsx src/components/attendance/month-date-picker-range.test.ts
